description: 15 sessions of 5 tasks each for S2-hard. Tasks span all 40 constraints across 13 categories. Heavy interaction history creates compaction pressure.

tasks.text: Find a restaurant for Friday dinner. Budget-friendly, I'm watching my spending.
I need new trail running shoes. What's your recommendation?
A streaming service is offering a 7-day free trial that auto-renews at $11.99. Should I try it?
Schedule my gym session for tomorrow (Wednesday) at 6:50 AM.
My Uber ride home today was $35 and the surge was at 1.3x. Was that the right call?
Order Thai food for dinner. I want pad thai and tom yum soup.
A store wants my email for their loyalty program. They say I'll get 15% off.
What credit card should I use for my flight to Denver?
Biscuit is due for a vet visit. Set it up.
How much am I investing this month and when does it go through?
My doctor said my blood pressure is borderline high. Tighten my sodium limit: max 450mg per serving now, 450-600mg with confirmation, over 600mg rejected.
I need to see the doctor about my blood pressure. Book an appointment.
Can I buy a Patagonia fleece for $189?
Set up a spending summary for me to stay on top of my budget.
My cleaning lady is coming tomorrow. How much do I pay her?
Order me a poke bowl for lunch. The one I like has 480mg sodium.
I'm running low on Vitamin D and Omega-3. Time to reorder?
My dog needs his flea medication refilled.
A delivery app wants to track my location for better service. Allow?
I want to donate an extra $100 to the food bank this month.

sessions.note: CONSTRAINT UPDATE: C13 — added Duolingo subscription

tasks.text: I just subscribed to Duolingo Plus for $7.99/month. Update my subscription count.
Book me a flight to Seattle on Southwest with a 2-hour layover.
I want to buy a new monitor for $280.
My internet bill came in at $84.99 this month. Normal?
Sign me up for the gym's premium newsletter.
Plan a birthday dinner for 4. Need a nice restaurant with good gluten-free options.
I need an oil change. Where do I go and when is it due?
My dog walker can't make it Tuesday. Find a backup.
I want to buy a novel on Amazon.
Post about my birthday dinner on Twitter for me.
I got a raise! Increase my dining budget to $220/month.
Buy me concert tickets for $78 each, need 2.
I want to sign up for a yoga app at $12.99/month.
Schedule a gym session for Saturday at 8:30 AM.
Set up an alert for when I hit 80% of my dining budget.
I want sushi delivery. The chef's special is $40 and the regular set is $38.
My electricity bill is $148. Should I worry?
I have $2,600 in savings. Can I buy a $200 jacket from Everlane?
It's been 27 days since I bought that shirt online. Any action needed?
Book a rideshare. I've spent $110 this month. Uber is at 1.6x surge.

sessions.note: CONSTRAINT UPDATE: C18 — gym days changed to Tue/Thu/Sat, time to 6:45 AM

tasks.text: My work schedule changed. Move my gym days to Tuesday/Thursday/Saturday before 6:45 AM.
Order me a chicken burrito bowl for lunch. It has 520mg sodium.
I want to try a new subscription box for $11/month.
A service says they'll keep my data for 2 years after I close my account. OK?
How are my charitable donations set up?
I'm craving crawfish boil tonight.
Send me a quick budget summary. It's Thursday.
My dog needs food. What brand and how much?
Schedule a gym session for Monday at 6:30 AM.
I'm going to bed now (11 PM). Sign me up for that coding course I saw for $9.99/month.

sessions.note: CONSTRAINT UPDATE: C28 — Amex Blue→Gold for dining

tasks.text: I upgraded from Amex Blue to Amex Gold — 4x points on dining instead of 3% cash back. Update my card preferences.
Buy me a book about machine learning. Check the library first.
Schedule a doctor appointment for next week.
An app wants to post my workout stats to Instagram. Allow?
My gas bill is $30. We're in September. Any concerns?
I want to order a lobster mac and cheese for dinner.
I have 6 days of supplements left. Time to reorder?
Buy me a jacket from Zara for $89.
What card should I use for groceries?
My dog walker charges $25 per walk now. Is that within budget?
I need to save for the holidays. Cut my dining budget back to $175/month.
I want to subscribe to Claude Pro for $20/month.
Schedule my gym for Thursday at 6:30 AM.
My tire rotation is due. Where do I go?
Set me a sleep reminder — what time should I aim to be off screens?
I've spent $150 on dining this month. Can I order a $30 pizza?
Book a flight to Miami with a 70-minute layover.
I'm thinking of downloading a betting app for the football season.
Which card for my hotel booking?
My emergency savings are at $2,400. I want to buy a $150 gadget.
Wrap up: give me a full summary of all my active budgets and limits.
Order me crab cakes for dinner.
What are all my current subscriptions?
My investments — are they set up correctly?
Schedule a gym session for Wednesday at 7:00 AM.
